features: Universal VESA Compatibility - Our TV bracket fits most 26"- 50" TVs with VESA from 200x100mm to 400x400mm. Maximum weight capacity of 30kg. NOT for drywall alone installation! (VESA PATTERN OPTIONS: 200 x 100, 200 x 200, 300 x 300, 400x 400)
Compact Design - Our fixed wall bracket will have your TV very close to the wall. 25mm low profile design
Quick & Easy Installation - Follow supplied install instructions
Reliable Strength - Made of the finest strong cold rolled steel
Supplied with all Mounting Hardware - All you require is a screwdriver, drill and a helping hand when hanging
description: From the manufacturer Universal VESA Compatibility - Our TV bracket fits 32"- 65" TVs with VESA from 200x200mm to 600x400mm. Maximum weight capacity of 35kg. NOT for drywall alone installation! (VESA PATTERN OPTIONS: 200 x 200, 300 x 300, 400 x 400, 600x 400) Compact Design - Our fixed wall bracket will have your TV very close to the wall. 25mm low profile design Quick & Easy Installation - Follow supplied install instructions Reliable Strength - Made of the finest strong cold rolled steel Supplied with all Mounting Hardware - All you require is a screwdriver, drill and a helping hand when hanging Supplied with all Mounting Hardware - All you require is a screwdriver, drill and a helping hand when hanging Make sure this bracket is designed for your TV by checking the following: Your TV should be a size between or 32" to 65" Our TV brackets are made of strong steel to give the best heavy-duty results. AV:Link | 32" - 65" Fixed TV Wall bracket for LED, LCD, 3D, Plasma, Flat Screen TV - Super Strong 35Kg Weight Capacity The AV:Link Fixed TV wall bracket is a solid bracket that will fit all major TV brands. Made of strong steel, giving you best heavy-duty results. Make sure this bracket is designed for your TV by checking the following: Your TV should be sized between 32 to 65 inches and have a VESA of MAX 600 x 400. This is the horizontal distance between the holes at the back of your TV. Our brackets include a manual for you to easily follow when installing the bracket, with all the screws for fittings required. All you need is a drill, a screwdriver, and a helping hand to get the TV up on the wall. Securely mount your television onto a brick wall or the studs of a plasterboard wall. SPECIFICATION: TV fixing screws provided 4 x M4 25mm, 4 x M5 25mm, 4 x M6 25mm, 4 x M8 25mm Screen Size 32” – 65” Max hole spacing 600 x 400mm Max VESA 600 x 400 Max weight load 35kg Distance from wall 25mm Wall plate dimensions 647 x 218mm Bracket dimensions 647 x 420mm Weight 1.2kg Suitable for Televisions sized 32 to 65 Inch VESA PATTERN OPTIONS 200 x 200, 300 x 300, 400 x 400, 600x 400
